detail.description: Raynel Delgado grounds out, third baseman Junior Caminero to first baseman Jonathan Aranda.
Raynel Delgado grounds out, second baseman Kody Clemens to first baseman Royce Lewis.
Raynel Delgado grounds into a force out, second baseman Kody Clemens to shortstop Tristan Gray. Yainer Diaz out at 2nd. Raynel Delgado to 1st.
Raynel Delgado doubles (1) on a line drive to left fielder Trevor Larnach.
Raynel Delgado lines out to shortstop Brayan Rocchio.
Raynel Delgado flies out to right fielder Kahlil Watson.
Raynel Delgado singles on a line drive to right fielder Kahlil Watson.
Raynel Delgado singles on a ground ball to center fielder Matt Vierling. Yainer Diaz scores. Cam Smith scores. Joey Loperfido to 3rd.
Raynel Delgado grounds out, shortstop Zach McKinstry to first baseman Spencer Torkelson.
Raynel Delgado singles on a ground ball to first baseman Spencer Torkelson.
Raynel Delgado grounds out to first baseman Spencer Torkelson.
Raynel Delgado out on a sacrifice bunt, pitcher Mason Fluharty to first baseman Vladimir Guerrero Jr. Brice Matthews to 2nd.
Raynel Delgado grounds out, shortstop Andrés Giménez to first baseman Vladimir Guerrero Jr.
Raynel Delgado flies out to center fielder Daulton Varsho.
Raynel Delgado pops out to third baseman Kazuma Okamoto.
Raynel Delgado grounds out, second baseman Luis Urías to first baseman Vladimir Guerrero Jr.
Raynel Delgado singles on a sharp line drive to right fielder Myles Straw.
Raynel Delgado singles on a line drive to right fielder Myles Straw.
Raynel Delgado grounds out, first baseman Vladimir Guerrero Jr. to pitcher Braydon Fisher.
Raynel Delgado grounds out, shortstop Andrés Giménez to first baseman Vladimir Guerrero Jr.
Raynel Delgado flies out to left fielder Jesús Sánchez.
Raynel Delgado flies out to right fielder Matt Vierling.
Raynel Delgado homers (1) on a fly ball to right field. Jake Meyers scores.
Raynel Delgado flies out to center fielder James Outman.
Raynel Delgado singles on a line drive to right fielder Lane Thomas. Brice Matthews to 2nd.
Raynel Delgado grounds out to first baseman Jac Caglianone.
